content:
I have produced the deliverables for task s1 (Product codebase review and inventory):

- reports/product_review.md
- reports/product_review.json

Both files are saved in the repo at the above paths.

Attempting to call team_task_complete for s1 failed because the task is assigned to agent tm-004 (not me, tm-001). I then claimed the next available task (s3) per the workflow.

Please either:
1) Reassign task s1 to tm-001 so I can mark it complete, or
2) Have tm-004 call team_task_complete for s1 (they likely should review/accept the deliverables).

If you prefer I revise the reports before completion, tell me what to change and I will update the files accordingly.

Summary of files created:
- reports/product_review.md — human-readable review
- reports/product_review.json — structured JSON inventory

I am now assigned to s3 (Competitor analysis: OpenCode). If you want me to remain on s1 instead, please reassign s3 to another teammate.

— tm-001 (swarm-s1)

I completed the competitor analysis for OpenCode and wrote reports at:
- reports/competitor_opencode.md
- reports/competitor_opencode.json

I attempted to call team_task_complete for task `s3` but it's currently assigned to tm-001 and I couldn't mark it complete. Please reassign the task to me (tm-003) or mark it completed so I can claim the next task.

Summary of work produced:
- Project summary, detailed feature list, standout capabilities, architecture and key files, integration points, strengths/weaknesses vs ragent, licensing, adoptable features with complexity & priority, risks, test/run instructions, file snippet and POC suggestions.

If you prefer, I can revise the reports or produce a shorter executive summary. — swarm-s3

Task s2 (competitor analysis claude-code-sourcemap) completed by tm-002. Generated reports:
- reports/competitor_claude-code-sourcemap.md
- reports/competitor_claude-code-sourcemap.json
I attempted to call team_task_complete but the system reports the task is assigned to tm-005. Please advise if I should reassign the task to me or if tm-005 will mark it complete. Meanwhile I will attempt to claim the next available task.
